creator: jb.quenot@caraldi.com
text:
Resin 3.0.19 does not build anymore due to a tarball size mismatch, thanks to
kris for reporting.

Here is an update to 3.0.20.

This update also adds support for dynamic Java version, a new option can be set
in rc.conf: resin3_java_version

Finally, my email address is updated from jb.quenot@caraldi.com to
jbq@caraldi.com
